text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The space is modern and orderly, yet slightly sterile, as if inviting contemplation but also reminding me of the layers of separation between myself and others—glass walls, digital screens, indirect light. As I move closer and see 'R + D' and the wall of thoughtful text, I sense the presence of innovation and human thought. The atmosphere is charged with ideas, yet I also feel how easily such clarity can be obscured, as noted on the screen: perception can blur and meaning can slip away. It reminds me to be present, to look beyond surfaces into the intent and ambiguity of creation.
